title: Failed update from 1.12.0 to 1.13.2 on Windows 10
body:
### Issue Description

When starting podman-desktop, it reported that a new version is available: 1.32.0.

Clicking the "Update" button in podman-desktop caused podman-desktop to freeze, then crash. After re-opening podman-desktop, the same update modal appears, with the same result if clicked.

I went to github releases to download _podman-desktop-1.13.2-setup-x64.exe_.

After installing it, podman-desktop claims that there is no podman machine. There was one before the upgrade.
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e3485a0c-86b7-4ac0-9169-10212a8d3ebc)

When trying to initialise the podman machine, podman-desktop fails, due to a VM with this name already existing.
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0b255faa-478a-4a04-b9ae-002546c76e88)


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Install podman-desktop 1.12.0
2. Initialize the podman machine, pull images, start containers
3. See that updating podman-desktop from the UI causes the application to crash
4. Download and install _podman-desktop-1.13.2-setup-x64.exe_
5. See that the existing podman machine is gone
6. Try to initialize a new machine and see that it fails

### Describe the results you received

My podman installation is not broken.
My images/containers are still there.

### Describe the results you expected

I expected the minor version update to go smoothly, so that I can get work done.

### podman info output

OS: windows/amd64
provider: wsl
version: 5.2.4

Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman socket: failed to connect: dial tcp 127.0.0.1:62562: connectex: No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Barebone install: no additional plugins or changes in the configuration.

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body:
Wrong github repository, sorry. I created an issue in podman-desktop repository instead: https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop/issues/9358

I should have had coffee before reporting issues in the morning...
